_doc: HORKOS deterministic tier classifier. Shipped data, PR-able. Inputs are MECHANICAL facts only (operation, novelty, scope, system, conflict). Agent confidence is deliberately NOT an input. Copy to ~/.horkos/classifier.json to override.

_tiers.1: receipt check: version bump / SHA / status from the write response already in the ledger, zero extra calls
_tiers.2: presence probe: targeted API GET / search / conditional request

critical_overrides.why: new artifact creation always gets a full content re-fetch (feedback_thoroughness: API success is NOT proof for new page creation)
destructive ops always get the deepest audit

escalators.why: a 409/error observed during the write means the final state is uncertain: escalate one tier

base_rules.why: local filesystem receipts are content-addressed and free to check
git SHAs are tamper-evident; existence check is free
targeted small edit: version-bump receipt is sufficient proof
multi-section edit: presence probe confirms the sections landed
full-body rewrite: always a full re-fetch, no exceptions, regardless of confidence in the diff

scope_thresholds._doc: deterministic scope from the byte size of the body the agent sent
